description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a sky blue body and a light gray top and bottom. The barrel features three prominent horizontal reinforcement rings spaced evenly along its height, giving it structural rigidity. The surface is weathered, with visible paint chipping and streaks, especially near the top and bottom edges, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. On one side, there is a yellow triangular warning label with a black exclamation mark, indicating the contents may be hazardous. The top of the barrel has two circular bungs or caps, likely for filling and emptying the contents. The overall appearance suggests it is used for industrial or urban storage, possibly for chemicals or waste.
description: A weathered blue metal barrel with gray ends, reinforcement rings, and a warning label, featuring two bungs on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue barrel with chipped paint and a single central bung on the gray top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the clean blue surface, chipped paint at the top, and both bungs visible on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view with more pronounced paint wear and streaks, showing the central bung on the top.
description_view_3: View with a clear yellow warning label, chipped paint, and both bungs visible on the top.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow warning label with exclamation mark
